name: NDA Red Flag Review
description: Screen NDAs and confidentiality agreements against a deterministic 14-category red-flag catalog and produce a clause-referenced review report with severity ratings, missing-clause findings, and negotiation recommendations. Customize the bundled house-position template for your organization before real use.
author: accilium
trigger_phrases: is this NDA okay to sign
was ist problematisch an diesem NDA
prepare NDA feedback for the counterparty
example_input: Pasted English NDA text with a broad residuals clause, no export-control reservation, and a 24-month non-solicit without carve-outs; user asks whether it's safe to sign.
